item.description:
1
2

21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Jason Momoa
"I love those who can smile in trouble, who can gather strength from distress, and grow brave by reflection." - Leonardo da Vinci So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: The first Holocaust didn't start with Jews, and neither will the second.
item.description: Source: https://bsky.app/profile/alexpetrovnia.bsky.social/post/3mlbvu5nlhc2g The text "or against Americans anywhere" deserves particular highlighting -- this won't be limited to within the US' borders if it goes into effect. Note that the United States is a member of the Five Eyes organization (alongside Canada, the UK, Australia, and New Zealand) and has extradition treaties with almost every country in the world (and the ones they don't have treaties with are ones where it's already illegal to be trans), to say nothing of their global military infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: VinchVolt

item.title: Memes vol 677
item.description:
Toe, calf, knee, and Shinzo- yeah autocorrect I meant fucking SHINZO lmfaoo
I hope I still feel this way when I’m 30 or when I get back pain… whichever comes first really
Genuinely where else are you supposed to eat
I’ve decided I’m not going to wear black anymore and to wear pink as often as I can to combat the blandness of fascism
No we can’t “agree to disagree” when a political party is sending people to internment camps and actively legislating against anybody who’s not a white man!! Fuck you!!! I posted on Instagram the picture of Sally Bowles saying “after all it’s just politics and what has that got to do with us?” With the caption “Anybody who likes trump and ice please unfollow me- please unfriend me and please don't interact with me. What is going to be the line for you people? What is it going to take for you to admit that the man you admire so much is an evil human? That he's a rapist and a felon and a Nazi and he's ripping families apart and it's ok for you. It took the murder of an American woman for ICE to make headlines everywhere but what about the "illegal" immigrants who embody the American spirit more than Kyle Rittenhouse or Jonathan Ross could ever dream and they're being taken from this country where they came to find a better life. Children are being ripped from their families and they're celebrating it- I'm fucking sick. It's so funny how republicans hate black people and Mexicans and drag queen and gay people for whatever their reason is when white men make up 53% of mass shooters and why is it everytime I open my news app it's not a drag queen molesting children but almost always a white man of the church? Can that please be explained to me? Oh obviously it's the woke left's agenda out to get them... right. Oh and as for Christians? Guys HOW did we get Jesus' teachings so WRONG- "When immigrants live in your land with you, you must not cheat them. Any immigrant who lives with you must be treated as if they were one of your citizens. You must love them as yourself, because you were immigrants in the land of Egypt; I am the Lord your God." Leviticus 19:33-34 HOW HAS THE WORD OF GOD BEEN SO MISCONSTRUED!!! And guys those of you who "aren't into politics" please pay attention- we have a fucking gestapo you need to know what's going on. Go watch cabaret I'm begging you.” I’m so done with those types of people- idc if you were my friend or family you’re dead to me
Chat who is this I love her
I saved this because I was going to ask an elder but forgot- is this true… and was it Monica Lewinsky under the desk
I’ve started having insane gi issues from my job in the morning when I think about going in lol
Guys don’t get mad at me… dead poets society
Big Mama tax
Bruce tax
Gertie tax- dude I’m gagged she’s so freaking cute
Nessie tax

item.title: Economics for creative professionals
item.description: MV - Grateful for the support for indie creators - while I'm here, I'd like to ask for your help in two ways. 1. Grab a book: https://inkican.com/emergency-reality-shelter 2. Join the Crew: https://inkican.com/join-the-crew
item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: GenZ vs GenX, how big is the difference ?
item.description: @szugyizsolt (Instagram) @Ankylosaur : Not this Rick-Beato-ass gen-x ragebait shit again. All those Dua Lipa songs are off the same album, "Future Nostalgia", which you might guess from the title is composed of reworkings of elements from classic pop songs. This isn't some dirty secret act of theft, it's the whole concept of the album, and the original artists and songs are credited in the liner notes. And it's more creative than an album of straight covers, which is something relatively common that no one complains about.
item.dc:creator: kayzersosie

item.title: Greenpeace: The war in Iran is a human tragedy.⁣ But for fossil fuel giants? It’s a goldmine.⁣ Over $75,000,000 added to FIVE oil CEOs’ fortunes in weeks.⁣ When conflict drives up energy prices, oil corporations cash in. – While we pay more for everything
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: What's the worst that could happen
item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: Rachel Entrekin crushed the Cocodona 250!
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/rachel__entrekin/ The race has both male and female racers race together and she beat everyone, male and female. She beat the last record holder by almost two hours. So next time people talk about trans people in sports, let them know women don't need their "protecting" in sports. If people are looking to protect women they can look up the leading cause of death for pregnant and postpartum women in the United States.
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

I'd love to see the staff meeting after the servants got turned into furniture in beauty and the beast
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: You're Going to Be Tired of Losing So Much
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/trump-raped-children-and-is-losing-so-much-df01218b89ca925015fe41c700d6beb9 WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal court ruled Thursday against the new global tariffs that President Donald Trump imposed after a stinging loss at the Supreme Court. A split three-judge panel of the Court of International Trade in New York found the 10% global tariffs were illegal after small businesses sued. The court ruled 2-1 that Trump overstepped the tariff power that Congress had allowed the president under the law. The tariffs are “invalid″ and ”unauthorized by law,” the majority wrote. ... At issue are temporary 10% worldwide tariffs the Trump administration imposed after the Supreme Court in February struck down even broader double-digit tariffs the president had imposed last year on almost every country on Earth.
item.dc:creator: jtwood

item.title: A mama bear leaving her cubs with a human while she goes hunting.
item.description: This is Dr. Valentin Sergeevich Pazhetnov. He raised and rehabilitated almost 300 brown bears.

item.title: Happy 100th birthday to Sir David Attenborough
item.description: Today is a very special day in the world of natural history: Friday, May 8, 2026, marks Sir David Attenborough’s 100th birthday.
